fields.name: leftId
fields.description: Identifier for the related entity on the left side.

fields.name: rightId
fields.description: Identifier for the related entity on the right side.

fields.name: filteredLinks
fields.description: A list of filtered link specifications.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Junction entity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Persistent entity used as the join table
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: join table, link table, bridge table, junction table, mapping table

overridableConfigKeys.label: Left entity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity type on the left side of the N:M relationship
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: left side, source entity, from entity, parent entity

overridableConfigKeys.label: Left FK field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Junction column holding the left entity's id
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: left foreign key, left FK, source key, parent key

overridableConfigKeys.label: Right entity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity type on the right side of the N:M relationship
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: right side, target entity, to entity, child entity, related entity

overridableConfigKeys.label: Right FK field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Junction column holding the right entity's id
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: right foreign key, right FK, target key, child key
